7: }:
8: let
9:   my-kubernetes-helm = pkgs.wrapHelm pkgs.kubernetes-helm {
10:     plugins = builtins.attrValues (
11:       lib.filterAttrs (name: _: lib.hasPrefix "helm-" name) pkgs.kubernetes-helmPlugins
12:     );
13:   };
14:   my-helmfile = pkgs.helmfile-wrapped.override { inherit (my-kubernetes-helm) pluginsDir; };
15: 
16:   # # Fix opencode-desktop: upstream flake is missing outputHashes for git dependencies
17:   # ref: https://github.com/Vishal2002/opencode/tree/fix/auth-to-body-provider-dialogs
18:   # NOTE: auth->body sed patches removed; SDK types expect `auth` and tsgo -b fails with `body`
19:   opencode-desktop = inputs.opencode.packages.${system}.desktop.overrideAttrs (old: {
20:     cargoDeps = pkgs.rustPlatform.importCargoLock {
21:       lockFile = inputs.opencode + "/packages/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.lock";
22:       outputHashes = {
23:         "specta-2.0.0-rc.22" = "sha256-YsyOAnXELLKzhNlJ35dHA6KGbs0wTAX/nlQoW8wWyJQ=";
24:         "tauri-2.9.5" = "sha256-dv5E/+A49ZBvnUQUkCGGJ21iHrVvrhHKNcpUctivJ8M=";
25:         "tauri-specta-2.0.0-rc.21" = "sha256-n2VJ+B1nVrh6zQoZyfMoctqP+Csh7eVHRXwUQuiQjaQ=";
26:       };
27:     };
28:   });
29: in
30: {
31:   environment = {
32:     sessionVariables = {
33:       NIXOS_OZONE_WL = "1"; # This variable fixes electron apps in wayland
34:       NIXPKGS_ALLOW_UNFREE = "1";
35:       XDG_CACHE_HOME = "$HOME/.cache";
36:       # XDG_CONFIG_DIRS = "/etc/xdg";
37:       XDG_CONFIG_HOME = "$HOME/.config";
38:       # XDG_DATA_DIRS = "/usr/local/share/:/usr/share/";
39:       XDG_DATA_HOME = "$HOME/.local/share";
40:       XDG_STATE_HOME = "$HOME/.local/state";
41:     };
42:     variables = {
43:       EDITOR = "nvim";
44:       NIX_REMOTE = "daemon";
45:     };
46:     # things should end up in systempackages if
47:     # they are required for boot or login or
48:     # have namespace conflicts i don't want to deal with in home manager
49:     # or just because
50:     # etc.
51:     systemPackages = [
52:       my-helmfile
53:       my-kubernetes-helm
54:       opencode-desktop
55:     ]
